work_items_type_board_column_check.name: work_items_type_board_column_check
work_items_type_board_column_check.value:
(
        ("work_items"."type" IN ('task', 'idea') AND "work_items"."board_column_id" IS NOT NULL)
        OR
        ("work_items"."type" IN ('epic', 'feature', 'story') AND "work_items"."board_column_id" IS NULL)
      )

api_keys_owner_check.name: api_keys_owner_check
api_keys_owner_check.value: "user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "service_account_id" IS NOT NULL

idea_items_type_status_check.name: idea_items_type_status_check
idea_items_type_status_check.value:
(
        ("idea_items"."type" = 'idea' AND "idea_items"."status" IN ('draft', 'active', 'to_review', 'approved', 'archived', 'rejected'))
        OR
        ("idea_items"."type" = 'seed' AND "idea_items"."status" IN ('draft', 'active', 'to_review', 'approved', 'archived', 'rejected'))
        OR
        ("idea_items"."type" = 'todo' AND "idea_items"."status" IN ('pending', 'done', 'blocked'))
      )
